config.betterblockentities.title: Better Block Entities
config.betterblockentities.enable_optimi: §7Turns the entire optimization system on or off.
config.betterblockentities.optimize_ches: §7Turns off all Chest optimizations, overrides the option: §l§nChest Animations§r
config.betterblockentities.optimize_sign: §7Turns off all Sign optimizations, overrides the option: §l§nSign Text§r
config.betterblockentities.optimize_shul: §7Turns off all ShulkerBox optimizations, overrides the option: §l§nShulker Animations§r
config.betterblockentities.optimize_bell: §7Turns off all Bell optimizations, overrides the option: §l§nBell Animations§r
config.betterblockentities.optimize_deco: §7Turns off all Decorated Pot optimizations, overrides the option: §l§nDecorated Pot Animations§r
config.betterblockentities.sign_text_ren: §7The amount of blocks the sign text will stop rendering at
config.betterblockentities.update_type.t: §7Type of update scheduler being used. §l§nSmart§r §7updates only when the BE is not in line of sight or out of FOV. §l§nFast§r §7updates immediately
config.betterblockentities.extra_render_: §7The amount of extra render passes each optimized block entity should be rendered for after it stops animating, can help smooth out visual bugs
